disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous brisk bleeding from a dental extraction socket for 8 hours, failing sustained gauze pressure
trigger_question_examples: How long has the socket been bleeding?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a molar out this morning and the socket has been pouring blood for eight hours — it slows when I bite on gauze but restarts the second I let go.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lifelong easy, extensive bruising after minimal trauma (mucocutaneous bleeding pattern)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had bleeding or bruising problems before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I've bruised really easily my whole life, big bruises come up from tiny knocks, and I've got a few on my arms and thighs right now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent prolonged childhood epistaxis and gum bleeding on brushing
trigger_question_examples: Did you get a lot of nosebleeds as a child?
Do your gums bleed when you brush?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had loads of long nosebleeds as a kid that took ages to stop, and my gums bleed a bit whenever I brush hard.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heavy prolonged menstrual bleeding causing chronic iron deficiency
trigger_question_examples: Can I ask about your periods — are they heavy or long?
Have you ever been told you're anaemic from your periods?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My periods have always been really heavy and long — I was told I get a bit anaemic because of them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ingested ibuprofen (an NSAID) about 6 hours ago for dental pain
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any painkillers today?
Did you take anything like ibuprofen or aspirin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took one ibuprofen tablet about six hours ago for the tooth pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New lightheadedness on standing with ongoing blood loss (early hypovolaemia warning)
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling faint or dizzy at all?
Do you feel lightheaded when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I feel lightheaded and a bit woozy when I stand up now, after losing all this blood.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Family members with easy bleeding/bruising and post-surgical bleeding
trigger_question_examples: Does anyone in your family bleed or bruise easily?
Has anyone in the family had bleeding trouble after surgery?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: A couple of my relatives bruise and bleed easily too, and one had a lot of bleeding after an operation.
